# Topic Subagents

This folder contains focused subagent prompts for recurring repository topics.

- `observability/AGENT.md`
- `rbac/AGENT.md`
- `metrics/AGENT.md`
- `pagination/AGENT.md`
- `cookie/AGENT.md`

Each subagent is scoped to one concern and is meant to produce evidence-backed plans against the owning files in this repository.
